hero.description: Discover cutting-edge computing programmes in India’s technology capital. From artificial intelligence to blockchain, our school prepares international students for careers at the forefront of global innovation.

about.title: A Gateway to India’s Tech Ecosystem
content: The Presidency School of Computer Science & Engineering is one of the university’s flagship academic divisions, offering a comprehensive portfolio of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes in computing, software development, and emerging technologies. Situated on the Presidency University campus in Bengaluru — widely regarded as India’s technology capital — the school provides international students with direct access to one of the world’s most dynamic tech ecosystems.

Programmes within this school span foundational computer science, artificial intelligence, machine learning, data science, cyber security, blockchain technology, the Internet of Things, big data analytics, and DevOps engineering. The curriculum is designed with industry alignment at its core, ensuring that graduates are prepared for roles in multinational technology firms, research organisations, and innovative start-ups worldwide

features.title: Advanced AI & Computing Labs
features.description: Access dedicated laboratories with high-performance GPU clusters and industry-standard AI/ML platforms including TensorFlow, PyTorch, and cloud-based AI services.

features.title: Global Faculty Mentorship
features.description: Learn from researchers with international academic credentials and active industry consulting experience who bring real-world insights beyond the textbook.

features.title: Industry Partnerships
features.description: Collaborations with leading technology companies facilitate internships, globally recognised certifications (AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure), and placement opportunities.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be a value-based, practice-driven school committed to developing globally competent engineers, dedicated to building cutting-edge technology that enhances the quality of life.

mission.title: Mission
points: Cultivate a practice-driven environment integrating theory and hands-on computing
Attract and nurture world-class faculty excelling in teaching and research
Establish state-of-the-art computing facilities for effective learning
Promote interdisciplinary studies to nurture talent for global impact
Instil entrepreneurial and leadership skills to address social, environmental, and community needs

hero.description: Build the foundations of tomorrow across five core engineering disciplines. From electrical power systems and semiconductor design to civil infrastructure and energy exploration, our school equips international students with the technical expertise and practical skills demanded by industries worldwide..

about.title: Core Engineering on a Global Campus
content: The Presidency School of Engineering encompasses five established engineering departments — Electronics & Communication, Electrical & Electronics, Civil, Mechanical, and Petroleum Engineering — each delivering rigorous undergraduate and postgraduate education rooted in practical application. Located on the Presidency University campus in Bengaluru, the school provides international students with an engineering education that balances foundational theory, laboratory experience, and industry engagement within one of India’s foremost technology and manufacturing hubs.

The school’s programme portfolio spans traditional engineering disciplines alongside specialised offerings in VLSI design, embedded systems, building and construction technology, and drone technology. Faculty members bring credentials from leading Indian institutions including IITs and NITs, complemented by active research profiles and industry consulting experience. Students benefit from modern laboratory infrastructure, collaborative project work, study-abroad partnerships, and placement support connecting them to employers across sectors including semiconductor manufacturing, energy, construction, automotive, aerospace, and oil and gas.

features.title: Industry-Standard Laboratory Infrastructure
features.description: Work with advanced equipment across dedicated labs for circuit design, CNC machining, 3D printing, fluid mechanics, drilling simulation, and VLSI prototyping — all maintained to professional standards.

features.title: Faculty with Premier Credentials
features.description: Learn from academics with doctoral qualifications from IITs and NITs, combined with active research output and consulting experience across electronics, power, civil, mechanical, and petroleum sectors.

hero.description: Step into the digital future with application-focused computing programmes. From software development and data science to artificial intelligence and cybersecurity, our school prepares international students with the practical skills and industry-ready expertise that technology employers seek worldwide.

about.title: Where Information Becomes Insight
content: The Presidency School of Information Science offers application-centred computing education through three undergraduate programmes and a postgraduate programme, each designed to produce graduates with strong programming, analytical, and software development skills. The school focuses on fields that define the modern technology landscape — data science, artificial intelligence, machine learning, cybersecurity, cloud computing, and full-stack development. With a curriculum structured around the Choice Based Credit System (CBCS) and Outcome Based Education (OBE), students build both breadth and depth across information technology disciplines.

The school has established collaborations with IITs and prominent industry partners for laboratory training, summer programmes, and industry-based certification. A partnership with a Switzerland-based organisation through the Global AI Hub has provided AI and data science certification training to over 2,800 students. Faculty members have been trained at IIT Madras in XR/AR and VR technologies, and the school is developing a Centre of Excellence in Extended Reality (XR). Over 100 research scholars currently pursue doctoral programmes within the school, and a Digital Forensics initiative is being developed in collaboration with the Criminal Investigation Department of Karnataka State. The school’s BCA programme has been ranked 27th nationally among the Top 100 BCA Colleges and Universities.

features.title: Global AI Hub Certification Partnership
features.description: Strategic collaboration with a Switzerland-based organisation providing AI and data science certification training to students, with over 2,800 certifications delivered.

features.title: IIT Collaboration & XR Centre of Excellence
features.description: Faculty trained at IIT Madras in extended reality technologies, with an XR Centre of Excellence under development and ongoing partnerships with premier Indian institutions.

features.description: The Super-60 advanced training programme identifies fast learners and provides specialised skill development including CODEATHON events and hands-on modern software tool training.

about.title: Inspiring Responsible Business Leaders
content: The Presidency School of Management offers a comprehensive portfolio of business education programmes spanning undergraduate BBA degrees, postgraduate MBA specialisations, doctoral research, and a postgraduate diploma in public  administration. The school teaches all aspects of management — from finance, marketing, and human resource management to business analytics, digital marketing, and operations. With an AICTE-approved MBA programme and curricula built on the Choice Based Credit System (CBCS) and Outcome Based Education (OBE), students receive an education designed to produce industry-ready professionals and entrepreneurial thinkers.

The school goes beyond placement preparation. Due emphasis is placed on soft skill development, relevant certification programmes, and experiential learning including simulation exercises, case studies, corporate internships, and social project-based learning. The curriculum embeds internship experience directly into the academic programme, while networking with companies, firms, NGOs, and professional organisations provides students with real-world exposure. Guest speaker programmes and mentored courses bridge theory and practice, ensuring that graduates enter the workforce with both academic knowledge and practical professional capability. The School of Management has been nationally ranked among India’s top private B-Schools.

features.description: Internships, corporate simulations, case studies, and social project-based learning are integrated directly into the academic structure across all programmes.

hero.description: Build expertise in accounting, finance, taxation, and business analytics through professionally integrated commerce programmes. From CA Foundation and ACCA pathways to CMA-US certification and data-driven business intelligence, our school prepares international students for careers in finance, accounting, and commerce across global markets.

about.title: Shaping Future Business and Finance Leaders
content: The Presidency School of Commerce is one of the university’s largest academic divisions, dedicated to providing holistic education for students aspiring to become global leaders in commerce, accounting, finance, and economics. The school offers six distinctive undergraduate programmes — each integrating core commerce education with a professional specialisation — alongside doctoral research programmes in Commerce and Economics. The curriculum is designed with a conscious effort to develop competencies across accounting, taxation, financial markets, business analytics, and regulatory compliance, helping students develop the inferential ability to understand economic ecosystems and function strategically within them.

The school has established academic collaborations through MoUs with multiple institutions and industry bodies, and maintains an innovative teaching pedagogy aligned with global standards. Student forums including Arete, Digitopedia, Inferono, Pragya, Savatha, the Aviation Club, and Linchpin provide co-curricular engagement that complements academic learning. The annual research convention Anveshan, regular faculty development programmes, and industry guest lectures create an environment where academic rigour meets practical industry awareness. Several programmes integrate globally recognised professional certifications — ACCA, CMA-US, and CA Foundation — directly into the degree curriculum, giving graduates both academic qualifications and professional credentials upon completion.

features.title: Integrated Professional Certifications
features.description: Programmes integrating ACCA (recognised in 180 countries), CMA-US, and CA Foundation directly into the degree curriculum — graduate with both a degree and professional credentials.

hero.description: Transform creative vision into professional practice. From communication design and fashion to product innovation, spatial environments, game design, and fine arts — our school offers studio-based programmes that develop technically proficient, artistically sensitive, and design-thinking graduates ready for careers across the global creative industries.

about.title: Where Purpose and Passion Meet Design Practice
content: The Presidency School of Design offers seven undergraduate programmes spanning the full breadth of contemporary design disciplines — communication design, fashion design, product design, space design, game design, multimedia and animation, and fine arts — alongside a doctoral research programme. The school maintains creative workspaces including design studios, interactive smart classrooms, dedicated labs, and specialised areas for each design field. Industry-experienced faculty, handpicked from across the country, nurture the aesthetic talents of students through a collaborative setting that fosters technical proficiency, artistic sensibility, and design thinking.

All design students begin with a common first year that provides foundational exposure to various design disciplines and allows exploration of interests before specialising from the second year onwards. By the end of each programme, students have gained invaluable hands-on experience in their chosen field through studio projects, workshops, internships, industry collaborations, and portfolio development. The school emphasises the integration of creativity with social sustainability — graduates are prepared not just to design aesthetically, but to address real-world challenges through innovative, human-centred design solutions.

features.title: Common Foundation Year
features.description: All design students share a first year that introduces core design principles, creative thinking, and disciplinary exploration before specialising — ensuring well-rounded designers.

hero.description: Pursue a career in justice, advocacy, and governance through a BCI-approved legal education. From five-year integrated honours degrees to a postgraduate LL.M. with specialisation in IPR, international law, criminal law, corporate law, and constitutional law — our school prepares international students for impactful careers across the legal profession worldwide.

about.title: Building Future Legal Professionals
content: The Presidency School of Law, approved by the Bar Council of India and the Government of Karnataka, offers two five-year integrated bachelor’s honours programmes — B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) and B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) — alongside a one-year Master of Laws (LL.M.) degree with multiple specialisation tracks and a doctoral research programme in Law. The integrated honours law curriculum includes courses focused on personal and professional skill development: professional communication, researching and reasoning skills, advocacy skills, and drafting skills. These competencies are refined through moot courts, legal aid clinics, and internships conducted in accordance with BCI guidelines.

: The school emphasises holistic education — combining classroom learning with hands-on experiences, guidance from expert faculty and mentors, and support from class coordinators. Students can personalise their education through a range of electives and specialised courses in areas including corporate and commercial law, criminal law, constitutional and administrative law, technology and intellectual property law, and international trade law. The honours programme structure allows students to develop deep expertise in their chosen legal domain while maintaining the broad legal knowledge base essential for professional practice.

features.description: All undergraduate law programmes are approved by the Bar Council of India, ensuring graduates meet the professional standards required for legal practice in India.

hero.description: Tell the stories that shape public understanding. From traditional journalism and broadcast media to digital content creation, immersive storytelling, and film production — our school prepares international students for impactful careers across the evolving global media landscape.

about.title: Educating the Next Generation of Media Professionals
content: The Presidency School of Media Studies (PSOMS) was established to educate and train individuals in the field of media. The school offers a comprehensive BA in Journalism and Mass Communication with five specialisation tracks — covering traditional journalism, digital marketing and advertising, public relations, film and television production, immersive media (AR/VR), and digital storytelling. A postgraduate MA in Journalism and Mass Communication, a PG Diploma in Film Making, and a doctoral programme in Media Studies complete the school’s portfolio. The curriculum combines core principles of traditional journalism with the latest advancements in media technology.

Students engage in hands-on training across print, electronic, and digital media — mastering reporting, broadcasting, and real-time storytelling. The programme integrates filmmaking, data journalism, mobile journalism, and new media skills, equipping students to craft compelling visual narratives, analyse data effectively, and produce fact-based stories with impact. State-of-the-art TV, radio, and digital editing studios provide professional-grade training facilities. The school maintains a focus on media ethics, critical thinking, and audience engagement alongside technical production skills.

features.title: Five Specialisation Tracks
features.description: Choose from Digital Marketing & Advertising, PR & Corporate Communication, Film/TV & Digital Production, Immersive Media (AR/VR), or Digital Storytelling & Content Creation.

features.description: State-of-the-art TV, radio, and digital editing studios with advanced equipment for multimedia production, broadcast journalism, and content creation.

features.description: Hands-on experience across print, electronic, digital, and mobile media — mastering reporting, broadcasting, data journalism, and real-time storytelling.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become a value-based, communication-effective school of media and journalism, committed to creating an ethical and positive approach to reporting for the benefit of society at large.

Empower students with the knowledge and skills to address social, political, and economic challenges through media

Instil entrepreneurial and leadership skills to address social, environmental, and community needs

hero.description: Join the healthcare professionals who support diagnosis, treatment, and patient care across the modern medical system. From physiotherapy and medical laboratory technology to cardiac care, respiratory therapy, and medical imaging — our school prepares international students for essential clinical roles in hospitals, diagnostic centres, and healthcare organisations worldwide.

about.title: Training the Clinical Professionals Healthcare Depends On
content: The Presidency School of Allied Health Sciences offers six undergraduate programmes across the allied health professions — healthcare disciplines that support and complement the work of physicians and surgeons. These include physiotherapy, medical laboratory technology, cardiac care technology, respiratory care technology, medical imaging technology, and anaesthesia and operation theatre technology. Each programme combines scientific foundations with extensive clinical training, producing graduates who are technically proficient, ethically grounded, and immediately productive in clinical healthcare settings.

: Allied health professionals are essential to the functioning of modern healthcare systems — from the laboratory technologists who process diagnostic tests to the physiotherapists who restore patient mobility, the cardiac technologists who monitor heart function, and the imaging technologists who operate diagnostic equipment. India’s expanding healthcare sector — driven by hospital construction, diagnostic centre growth, and increasing health awareness — creates sustained demand for qualified allied health professionals. International students gain clinical training in a healthcare context that is both technologically advancing and serving one of the world’s largest patient populations.

features.title: Clinical Training Integration
features.description: All programmes incorporate extensive clinical rotations in hospitals and diagnostic centres, ensuring graduates develop hands-on professional competence alongside theoretical knowledge.

features.title: Essential Healthcare Roles
features.description: Allied health professionals perform critical functions in diagnosis, treatment, rehabilitation, and patient monitoring — roles that are indispensable to modern healthcare delivery.

features.title: Growing Healthcare Demand
features.description: India’s rapidly expanding healthcare sector — new hospitals, diagnostic chains, and medical tourism — creates strong and sustained demand for qualified allied health professionals.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To develop skilled, compassionate, and ethically responsible allied health professionals who contribute to the delivery of quality healthcare and the improvement of patient outcomes across communities.

mission.title: Mission
points: Equip students with the scientific knowledge and clinical skills required for competent allied health practice
Provide extensive clinical training in hospital and diagnostic settings to develop practical professional competence
Foster ethical responsibility, patient-centred care, and commitment to healthcare quality improvement
Prepare graduates for professional certification, licensure, and career advancement in allied health fields
Instil a commitment to lifelong learning in response to evolving healthcare technologies and practices

programs.name: B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology

programs.name: B.Sc. Cardiac Care Technology (CCT)
programs.overview: Develop intelligent systems using machine learning, deep learning, and AI technologies across real-world applications.

programs.name: B.Sc. Respiratory Care Technology (RCT)
programs.overview: Explore blockchain architecture, smart contracts, and decentralized applications for future-ready systems.

programs.name: B.Sc. Medical Radiology and Imaging
programs.overview: Learn network security, ethical hacking, cryptography, and cyber defense strategies to protect digital systems.

hero.description: Explore the intersections of human thought, expression, and experience. From psychology and political science to English literature, performing arts, and theatre — our school offers interdisciplinary programmes that develop critical thinkers, creative practitioners, and culturally aware professionals ready to engage with the complexities of the modern world.

about.title: Cultivating Intellectual Curiosity Across Disciplines
content: The Presidency School of Liberal Arts & Sciences (SOLAS) offers a distinctive portfolio of interdisciplinary undergraduate programmes that combine two academic disciplines into a single integrated degree. Students choose from combinations spanning psychology, English, economics, political science, sociology, history, communication and media studies, performing arts, and theatre studies. This dual-discipline structure reflects the school’s belief that the most profound understanding comes from exploring connections between fields — developing graduates with the intellectual breadth, analytical depth, and creative capacity to navigate complex contemporary challenges.

The school also offers standalone B.Sc. Psychology and postgraduate programmes including M.Sc. Psychology (with specialisations in child, clinical, counselling, and industrial psychology) and M.A. English (with specialisations in digital humanities, cultural studies, creative writing, and educational leadership). A doctoral programme in English and four diploma programmes in classical and traditional performing arts complete the portfolio. The school fosters critical interpretation, analytical rigour, and creative exploration — empowering students through transformative educational experiences that develop their intellectual, creative, and analytical potential across liberal arts disciplines.

features.title: Dual-Discipline Degree Structure
features.description: Most programmes combine two academic disciplines — psychology with economics, English with political science, performing arts with psychology — producing uniquely versatile graduates.

features.title: Performing Arts & Theatre
features.description: India’s classical dance traditions (Bharatanatyam, Kathak, Kuchipudi), Western music, and theatre studies integrated into liberal arts degree programmes and standalone diploma courses.

features.title: Psychology Specialisation Depth
features.description: From B.Sc. Psychology through M.Sc. with four specialisation tracks (child, clinical, counselling, industrial), providing a complete psychology education pathway.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become a value-based centre of academic excellence that cultivates a dynamic learning environment where liberal arts inquiry, psychological understanding, and creative exploration empower students to excel in scholarly discourse and human development.

mission.title: Mission
points: Foster the ability to critically interpret, analyse, and articulate complex texts, human behaviour, and theoretical ideas within broader cultural, social, and historical frameworks
Strengthen analytical abilities for understanding various forms of human expression, communication, and psychological processes
Prepare students for advancement in higher education, professional careers in humanities and behavioural sciences, and scholarly research
Empower individuals through transformative educational experiences developing intellectual, creative, and analytical potential
